textByHash.fc2959e1aa3884a83090e3091f60927e47a8b59e: You seem to be a man of action. We could do with more people like you to sort those despicable bandits out.
textByHash.ba16739eb2837888ca29e058bbc066be484870bc: So will you join us in our fight to wipe them out?
textByHash.6390da2ba7abbe9e74f274dd6d5c7be5503d61f6: Good choice my friend, together we will crush them.
textByHash.3074b52cdbc946ff196201c6a48c6a88d7611589: Slow down, slow down. First you must prove yourself capable and trustworthy.
textByHash.0e35b44817239f02011b5729a7e69c8ce4697ebc: Don't worry about that, I'll just set you a few jobs to do.
textByHash.3dab8a90d1bea11900fab05f2ff30ee9b8c55528: As you might have gathered we have a less-than- sparkling reputation around here.
textByHash.34b704e86d698b5a51b65d99b1a6cf39913ed507: So I want you to foster this reputation and grow it.
textByHash.58fba2dda7d5f0112eb93115cba1cf05064403ca: It means that I want you to go out into the town and pickpocket three villagers, then report back to me.
textByHash.9d75c8260230f5873cdf99f34ade0afd33a74366: If you have any problems don't be afraid to ask for some advice.
textByHash.00b4a6dbd440955e826052b8a994bb28e351ed04: Can I help you with anything else?
textByHash.7de950c60f45aafbd5b60cfeaef6a07c89779705: That information is available on a need to know basis and right now, you don't need to know.
textByHash.a89ac7f3f80e848531bc04aee9f76f172ada17c2: Sheep, ready for the slau... hang on. I shouldn't be telling you that. Just forget I said anything.
textByHash.c98b1a15f47552e3fa6d14251c3c46b7feb0d3ef: Can you be a bit more specific? Everyone here is called Ali.
textByHash.d369b8197c0c5495cc04e7edba41a3dd5801e35b: Say no more. I know just the Ali you mean - that little snake robbed me too! If we work together perhaps we can catch him and teach him a lesson.
textByHash.88f7add30c6abd185e2f5839232a262bf4cc99c0: Tell me when you are ready. This deed should not be undertaken lightly.
textByHash.30af77feb5e105b9e8faf6dbe506de70f771854c: Don't take all day, time is getting on and there are still plenty of foul deeds to be done.
textByHash.99a112350a9b22a89b0f9bfb09784bc941f7490a: How is the pickpocketing going? Need a hand?
textByHash.0530d18239a76c56e053b9e2e5ec0865eb95571c: If you can't achieve your goal directly, try adding another element into the equation, like a distraction.
textByHash.40c6bb6013bbb46526627d744922e589e5c4773b: Do you know what I mean?
textByHash.9c8df1b2b842f6dbf14370cb3df503e2b74b92de: The distraction tactic isn't working any more?
textByHash.258af6fc1f0369a5cc427867071b7f96ec74cadf: It is a small town, news spreads fast. Perhaps using a spot of cunning and a bit of brute force might work better.
textByHash.5dbd64bf9d4e268db6b0878aff7c3ad1a26e848d: Here, take this, it might help.
textByHash.3f49c4aaaff381ca305b0fd8d6737df547db2c00: I've already given you a Blackjack, try using it.
textByHash.487aa10c3bed0db614e6a22754c51e2ecff9e2c7: Well done! You have finished your first trial.
textByHash.c175462c32b4778447803715dc3e6cbfd8dff77c: You didn't think we'd hire you off the back of a couple of pick-pocketings, did you?
textByHash.f7b542683e9a06b92405dff2e7a5178c9495f9be: Good! Now, the next thing you have to do is a spot of burglary.
textByHash.31ca6faba388849e5c813785862dfa16cfc8a643: The only place worth pilfering around here is the mayor's villa.
textByHash.4d5e21ebbd824c4eaaabe4b979b2ae62221080fd: I want you to retrieve his wife's jewels.
textByHash.75baec79841d634e737b51b3827dcdcfff9feb83: Well I think that a disguise would be a good start. After that I would stake out the place to make sure he's not in.
textByHash.7daa851ac11380dc536d05631b46109b46d8b704: You'll need a key to the front door, too.
textByHash.f5e313cfad070e374ea32a8fbf4a51749d5f88dc: Well then come back to me again when you are ready. Don't be too long.
textByHash.495f7e26259c53fb10b977bef19933bacf17aac6: Haven't I helped you enough already?
textByHash.476f1300770cc9598bfc510e9c36718a98e70fd7: So you've lost your keys then. It's lucky I keep a spare pair.
textByHash.a331ff2d86100c021ec5ce22cc0ea1b4d374f6ad: So what's the problem? Have you created a disguise yet?
textByHash.367628854ec3ab61ea6f2e50a99286e85c548bcd: Then make sure that you stake the place out to make sure neither the mayor or his family are inside.
textByHash.bc309a93b1aef82ac4d4690005d2bf6f80fb8c22: You'll have to create something that will hide your hair and obscure your facial features.
textByHash.1b49c655498ea300321e1927773bb6c33b35be24: Make sure you're wearing a pair of gloves so that you don't leave any incriminating finger prints.
textByHash.81aa27e2eb081b653bc6f36f4e2050b972f90d86: You should have all this equipped before you stake out the house.
textByHash.224cbca2ed0455d140b0159a8add19b48084fe4f: It's lucky I keep a spare pair.
textByHash.4fbeb25effae636549cc8705f3a80c56bb70e004: Try using those keys I gave you to open the door!
textByHash.c3ee899c4d2631dbeaa3255bbcd55ae450a8266c: Then search the house more thoroughly! Everything you need should be there.
textByHash.2266377dccd782641c3c00834bc74be5508c40c2: Impressive, I didn't expect you to crack that safe so quickly. Did you have help?
textByHash.3239cad92a53ea619daa4fa4764e2ca7721fbb27: That man is a fool. Now give me the jewels.
textByHash.97b07df78171efb757c752b0c2c5c456c0164108: You are trying my patience. Hurry back with the jewels. Don't disappoint me.
textByHash.376e1fa3d1ea8bbfd55704abc4b6b1ca20e1f5c1: Now, your final task is one of the upmost importance. It has come to my attention that there is a traitor in our midst.
textByHash.00d1619217424e7ee87781ab1c38a3fbbc47d45d: Yes, and I want you to root them out.
textByHash.1ae7fcd172733d10b8fb818d0aa786c3d6acbf61: Because I feel like I can trust you. You don't have the emotional baggage that comes with playing the villain your entire life.
textByHash.38979c65a7e5e3f9ab4760d8ee7692a8535a1acd: How is the search for the traitor going?
textByHash.d55092e37b8523c322b60ca2708977d2250a2fc9: Make sure you interview our other members. They may know more than they let on.
textByHash.2815caeabf421d08d9281779b87efc997a7b1547: No! I would never have suspected Traitorous Ali.
textByHash.20c1c3baaf8e0fe2a165076e0fd9df01a78ba818: Well, there was that time he sold out his entire family for a sandpit and an umbrella.
textByHash.44ba3ac69f8818ab04149904b592c7114d3acd0a: But I'm sure it took much more for him to betray us!
textByHash.b8d085b0bb03e1086077254a46aaeaddc5a9e7f9: Stop, I don't want to know. It hurts too much already. Find him and then kill him, but do it quietly. I don't want a fuss.
textByHash.c82c8675debd96d020d9cfbef4119c369252d520: Well don't waste time talking to me. Get on with it.
textByHash.4287a369ec87258ae35a023e7a74a6bde1dc26c1: Excellent work! Now, go speak with our boss.
textByHash.c453c804103d0595d2cc0d73b66fbc62e28b4b8e: He wants to discuss the future direction of the gang.
textByHash.981bd1f6ae2d1f499b537da9810f9c5d28d36afb: Why did you have to go and ruin everything? We had a beautiful future ahead of us, the town would have been ours!
textByHash.a0a294ed3a8f50e0e097b6b851730df5b3363446: I see. I knew the hunger for power would get to you eventually.
textByHash.aff0dc4fb722dae16377aea7b922940580bd9cbc: Really? I thought you were meant to follow those types blindly, with unquestioning loyalty.
textByHash.abf56d8e3dbd4d2b8df9fe7de0fe184582866551: No... it just wouldn't be the same. I think I'll just wallow in self pity for a while.
textByHash.16b216152b0b7e384df07e24f54c3697cb93dd70: No, I think I'll just wallow in self pity for a while.
textByHash.8026bf52b847bcd743269d7f98cf53c023091069: What do you want to know?
textByHash.569faa54feede60acf0491704ad7dc1a26df58fd: You will have to be a lot more specific if you want help finding him. Everyone here is called Ali.
textByHash.06e860168ee0df28d85fb334e15b57b0d10d644e: Say no more. I too am looking for him. The little tyke robbed me too, if we work together perhaps we can catch him and teach him a lesson.
